title: UFO researchers mysteriously died and vanished as far back as the 1940s, as per claims
description: The mystery of dead and missing scientists has led conspiracy theorists to claim that several such cases happened in the 1940s during the "flying saucer" era. Evidence was destroyed, people were warned to stay silent, and deaths were set up to look like suicides and accidents, as per claims.

title: UFO Whistleblowers Fear Being Called Crazy As Officials Admit Encounters With Unknown Craft Near Critical US Sites
description: US officials face pressure to release 46 classified UAP videos after whistleblowers report encounters near sensitive military sites and restricted airspace.

title: Steven Spielberg's Disclosure Day Sneak Peek Reveals Full Look at UFO
description: A new look at Steven Spielberg's Disclosure Day officially reveals a UFO piloted by the alien invaders.

title: Release the UFO files! (If they’re actually interesting)
description: If the Pentagon has “very interesting” information to share about possible alien life, we are here for it.

title: Trump drops hints of what's coming in new batch of UFO files set for release
description: President Donald Trump says the Pentagon is preparing to release some "very interesting" UFO files uncovered by his administration, generating a mix of buzz and skepticism as he hints at new revelations around questions of alien life.
